message:
🐛 fix: guard useLastRoute return against localStorage.getItem throwing

The hook's return statement called localStorage.getItem(LAST_ROUTE_KEY)
outside any try-catch. When localStorage throws (e.g. corrupt storage,
quota exceeded), the hook threw an unhandled exception.

Test 'does not throw when localStorage throws on redirect read' in
useLastRoute.test.ts correctly caught this — wrapping the return-time
getItem in a try-catch resolves Coverage Suite shard-6 failure.

Fixes Coverage RED introduced by #11021 / Coverage Suite run 25158063043.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
